'''''Bretie Facility''''' was a [[VenteX Construction Yards/Legends|VenteX Construction Yards]] [[Cargo Facility 1]] orbiting [[Nomlis III]] in the [[Kurdin system]]. It was involved as a production center in the [[TIE Experimental Project]].

==History==
Once the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] discovered the [[Space station/Legends|station]], they sent in a commando strike team aboard the [[Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport|''Gamma''-class ATR-6 Assault Transport]] [[Storm Unit (Gamma-class ATR-6 assault transport)|''Storm Unit'']] to "infiltrate the installation, steal all pertinent data, and then destroy the facility". The attack occurred while the factory was receiving deliveries of sensors and comm arrays from the [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|''Xiytiar''-class transports]] ''[[Vrexlir]]'' and ''[[Dandi]]''. [[Pressure tank|Pressure Tank]]s ''[[Nuro]]'' and [[Class-L cargo container|Class-L Cargo Container]]s ''[[Codec]]'' were also parked there. Even though it was defended by [[TIE Experimental M1|TIE Bizarros]], [[TIE Experimental M3|TIE Warheads]] and [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defenders]] from [[Shadow Squadron (TIE Defender)|Shadow Squadron]], the factory was eventually totally destroyed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
